## Definition of Done

- [ ] Linked to a spec under `specs/NNN-slug` (or marked "no spec needed" with reason below).
- [ ] Functional requirements covered (list the FR-XX IDs implemented).
- [ ] Tests were written first (TDD): the test failed before the implementation, passes now.
- [ ] All tests pass locally and in CI.
- [ ] Docs updated per the documentation rule (specs/contracts/board/glossary as applicable).
- [ ] Board cards moved to reflect the new state (Doing -> Review/Done).
- [ ] No `[[` Obsidian wikilinks in committed Markdown (use relative paths).
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits (`type(scope): subject`).
- [ ] `bash scripts/validate.sh` passes.
